It's (a) quarter to (US of) four now I'll meet you at quarter past (US after).

c: 他们和客人一起吃饭。
她家没有客人。
家里来了客人。
e: They eat with their guests.
She doesn't have any guests at her house.
There is a guest in my home

c: 车窗是不能打开的，但是空调很好，不过头，这一点在这个小小的空间里很要紧。
在我们刚开始好的时候，他骗过我一次，跟一个家里有空调的女孩出过轨。
他特意提到有空调，是因为他想要到那儿去睡觉——既没蚊子，夜里也不会出汗。
e: The windows did not open, but the air-conditioning worked well without overdoing it - important in such a small space.
He cheated on me once, when we first started, with this girl who had air-conditioning at her place.
He told me about it because he would sleep there - no mosquitoes, no night sweats.

c: 打出来的女人口服，疼出来的的女人心服。
这是他们的口号。
那小女孩说话有点口吃。
e: Hit woman oral pain, the woman convinced.
That was their slogan.
The little girl speaks with a little stutter.

c: 他的女儿听说不带她去看电影而大声哭号起来。
他们(对她)一说，她就哭了。
现在不是哭鼻子的时候。
e: His daughter began to roar when he refused to take her to the cinema.
They told her and she wept.
This ain't any time for blubbering.

c: 后来，吃完晚饭，大姐想起了她弟弟的裤子。
那个时候，裤子被视为很女人气。
你知道我的裤子在哪儿吗？
e: Laters on, after supper, the elder sister remebered her brother's trousers.
At that time, pants were considered unmanly.
Do you know where my trousers are?

c: 一个筷子想到了一个主意。
你的筷子用得真好，是谁教你的？
午饭前他教那个外国人怎样使筷子。
e: One chopsticks thought of an idea.
You are so skilled with chopsticks, who taught you?
Before lunch he learned the foreigner how to use chopsticks.

c: 一个身着蓝色工作服的人从路边的下水道里爬了出来。
那里有两个女孩子，穿着蓝白条的衣服，我想她们是学生。
那些白衣服放在一起洗，这件蓝的要单洗。
e: A man in blue coveralls is emerging from a hole in the sidewalk.
There were two girls, blue with white stripes, students, I believe.
Wash the white clothes together, and the blue one separately.

c: 老人说，“多谢你来看我！”
老师请几个学生在他家吃午饭。
学生们爱他们的老师。
e: And I thank you because you come over to me.
The teacher lunched several students at his home.
The pupils love their teacher.

c: 你怎么能就那样离开了我们？
他开始和桌子跟前的人们说话，离开了我。
他离开这里怕有二十天了。
e: How could you leave us like that?
He starts talking to people at the table, away from me.
He left here for probably 20 days (I'm afraid).

c: 你喜欢这个礼物，我很高兴。
妈妈，你想我好不好现在写一封信去谢谢她的礼物呢？
对不起，我不能帮助你，我正在给大明做生日礼物。
e: I'm glad that you like it.
Mamma, do you think it would do any good if I should write to her thanking her for the album?
Sorry, I can't. I am making a birthday card for Daming.

c: 今年可能是已知历史上最热的一年。
这是历史上的一件真事。
我们一点也不知道他已往的历史。
e: This could be the hottest year in known history.
It's an actual event in history.
We know nothing of his past.

c: 我能从他的脸上看出他生气了。
看我的脸面，不要生他的气了。
他脸上显出很高兴的样子。
e: I could tell by his face that he was angry.
For my sake, don't get angry with him.
His face expressed great joy.

c: 今天晚上，我和她一起做了听写练习。
我们的练习本在这里。
请把那写在你们的练习本上。
e: She and I did a dictation exercise together tonight.
Our exercise books are here.
Write that in your exercise-books, please.

c: 我们叫辆出租汽车好吗？
你这辆大车一天能跑几个来回？
然后有一辆小车出现了，那是我的朋友小颠。
e: Shall we call a taxi?
How many round trips can your cart make in a day?
Then a little car pulls up. It is my friend, Bumpy.

c: 我希望有机会对中国画有更多的了解。
真理是需要我们两个人来发现的：一个人来讲说它，一个人来了解它。
但他年事已高，也不了解现在的世界是怎样的。
e: I hope I can have a chance to know more about Chinese painting.
It takes two of us to discover truth: one to utter it and one to understand it.
But he is old and he doesn't know how the world is.

c: 我的儿子对我们所有邻居发生的事情知道得比我还要早。
下个月准备休息一星期，我打算去旅游，所以想请邻居帮我照顾我的小狗。
安静～我想告诉你的是，它不是我们的狗，它是邻居家的狗，他们正在街上找它，所以你不能收留它，下回先听我说．
e: My son knows what is going on with all our neighbors before I do.
Next month I will have a week's break and I'm going away, so I want to ask my neighbour to help look after my dog.
C QUIET!! i`m trying to tell you ,its not our dog,it`s our neighbor`s dog.they`re out on the street looking for it now,so of course you can`t keeP it.next

c: 下去看看他们在楼下干什么。
他的朋友们住在书店的楼上。
那个是什么楼？
e: Go down and see what they are doing downstairs.
His friends live above the bookshop.
What is that building?

c: 你喝绿茶吗？
我是月琴学校的学生，这个学校很漂亮，有很多高楼，绿树，漂亮的花朵。我们也有很棒的老师，我喜欢在我的学校读书。
妈妈，你能为我买一个新的绿色皮书包吗？
e: Do you drink green tea?
I am a student in Yueqing FLS. My school is very beautiful. there are many tall buildings, GREen tress, nice flowers in our school. We have wonderful teachers too. I like studying in my school.
Mom, could you buy me a new green leather schoolbag?

c: 她的马车是院子里最漂亮的。
你等我一下，我马上回来。
是的是的。我们有约在先。我马上去做。
e: Her carriage was the most beautiful one in the yard.
Wait here for me. I'll be right back.
All right. We agreed. I'll do it in a minute.

c: 你等我一下，我马上回来。
是的是的。我们有约在先。我马上去做。
即使多年没有看见我的同学，我也马上认出了他。
e: Wait here for me. I'll be right back.
All right. We agreed. I'll do it in a minute.
"Even though I hadn't seen my classmate for many years, I recognized him immediately. "

c: 大家对他的工作很满意。
从字里行间可以看出他很满意。
对你的工作不满意？
e: Everyone was pleased with his work.
His satisfaction can be traced between the lines.
Not satisfied with your job?

c: “年轻的时候，我帽子很多很多，出去的话，我绝不会不戴帽子！”她说。
挂在那儿的是谁的帽子？
你认为我的新帽子怎么样？
e: "When I was young I had so many hats and Iwould never go outside without a hat!" she said.
Whose hat is hanging there?
What do you think of my new hat?

c: 我吃米饭，你呢？
我想吃米饭。
在你们国家吃米饭吗？
e: I eat rice, what about you?
I want to have rice.
Do you eat rice in your country?

c: 坐在他前面的那个女人说：“那我就算是吃面包点心的。”
什么在这个面包上？
你喜欢吃米饭还是吃面包？
e: "I guess I eat them, " the woman in front of him said.
What is on the bread?
Do you like to eat rice or bread?

c: 你先吃个苹果吧。我去给你做面条儿。
你喜欢米饭还是面条？
你以前吃过面条吗？
e: You eat an apple first I'll go and make you some noodles.
Do you like rice or noodles?
Have you ever eaten noodles before?

c: 你们都明白了吗？
你明白了吗？
我们明白了——那么，我们在那了吗？
e: Do you all understand ?
Do you understand?
We see... so, are we there yet?

c: 朋友问你喜不喜欢加拿大。你说，喜欢这个国家，但很少有机会去
请拿大一点的给我看看。
先生，这是本店的拿手菜。
e: I like the country, but I have little opportunity to go there.
Please show me a larger one.
This is the specialty of our restaurant, sir.

c: 让我们回到你奶奶的问题。
白雪：请等等，早上好，老奶奶！
我今天去看望了奶奶。
e: Which brings us back to your grandma.
S.w: Hello, Good morning grandma!
Today, I visited my grandma.

c: 他说："我们一年365天在南北极都有人。
我明天上南京。
我们打算坐早车去南京。
e: Our people are in the Arctic and Antarctic 365 days a year.
I'm leaving for Nanjing tomorrow.
We're going to take the morning train to Nanjing.

c: 不会。中国话很难学。
你难道听不出来他说的是气话吗？
有的人爱先做难做的工作。
e: No. The Chinese language is hard to learn.
He just said it to vent his anger.
Some people tackle the difficult jobs first.

c: 答：当然非常难过，因为我不能和妻儿在一起。
她很为他感到难过。他没有妻室，大夫每天都去看他。
真教人难过，这么可爱的一家子。
e: A: Of course, I was very sad. I couldn' t be with my wife and child.
She felt sorry for him, He had no wife or family, and the doctor visited the house every day.
This is so awful, they were such a sweet family.

c: 我们是几年级的孩子么？
他读三年级。
我儿子上小学三年级。
e: What grade are we in, anyway?
He is in the third grade.
My son's in the third grade.

c: 当我今天见到一个三十六岁的女人时，我觉得她很年轻。
他看见了两个年轻人，在他们面前站住了。
“年轻的时候，我帽子很多很多，出去的话，我绝不会不戴帽子！”她说。
e: When I see a woman of thirty-six today, I find her young.
He saw the two young people and stopped in front of them.
"When I was young I had so many hats and Iwould never go outside without a hat!" she said.

c: 是的，那飞鸟为我们上了很好的一课。
鸟有飞的本能。
你们不比飞鸟贵重得多么。
e: Yes, the birds can be a good lesson for us.
Birds have the instinct to learn to fly.
Are you not much more valuable than they?

c: 我的弟妹和你的弟学习一样努力。
我们担心我们没有做到和别的女人，那些因为她们的努力而得到回报的女人，一样多。
他和往常一样努力工作。
e: My brother works as hard as yours.
We worry that we' re not doing as much as other women, who' ll be rewarded for their efforts.
He works as hard as ever.

c: 每个星期天我们都去爬山。
我还没想好去爬山还是去看电影。
在閒暇之馀，我最喜欢做的事就是和朋友去爬山。
e: We go to climb mountains every Sunday.
I haven't decided whether to go hiking or to go to the movies.
During my free time, the thing I like to do best is go hiking in the mountains with my friends.

c: 她说，你最好不要在盘子里小便，你个表字养的。

这就行了：过了两三分钟就在他面前的餐桌上摆上了一大盘子意大利通心面条和肉。
e: She say you better not fuck on the table, you son of a 'beach'.
"Then you just don't understand coffee, " she snapped, clearing my plate and coffee cup from the table.
That was enough: in a few minutes there was a large plate of macaroni and meat on the table before him.

c: 他胖起来了。
这位老先生太胖，我一个人搀不起他来。
想给你的新生儿读读儿歌“小矮胖子”？
e: He's getting fat.
The old gentleman was too heavy, I wasn't able to help him up alone.
Want to read "Humpty Dumpty" to your newborn?

c: 我在哪儿可以买到啤酒？
我记得你说过你喜欢中国因为它有便宜的啤酒。
如果你尝试喝一次啤酒，我不会在意；但是我希望你不会喜欢上它。
e: Where can I get some beer?
W: I remember you said that you like China because it has cheap beers.
I don t care if you try beer once, but I hope you won t like it.

c: 我到一个新朋友家做客，他问我喝红葡萄酒还是白葡萄酒，我告诉他那要看晚餐是什么，结果是羊肉。
我喜欢所有的水果，就是不喜欢葡萄。
葡萄好吃是好吃，就是子儿太多。
e: My host, a new friend, asks if I'm drinking red or white. I tell him that depends on what's for dinner.
I like all fruits with the exception of grape.

c: 我第一次来到中国和北京大学是在1981年的夏天，那时，我还是一名学习普通话的大学生。
我不认字；也说不好普通话。
你必须要会普通话或是粤语，最好两者都会。
e: I first came to China, and to Peking University, in the summer of 1981 as a college student studying Mandarin.
I can't read or write; I can't even speak standard Mandarin well.
You'll have to learn Mandarin or Cantonese, and preferably both.

c: 不是骑车的好天气。
骑车去怎么样？
你怎么骑着自行车就跑来了，不是说好开你的新车来接我吗？
e: Not good weather for cycling.
How (or What) about going by bike?
LL: I never said "new car", I said "new ride". What, don't you like it?

c: 它们其实不在你的眼上而是在眼中。

你其实可以早一点儿来。
e: They are not on your eyes but in them.

c: 看看其他人是怎么做事的，听听其他人都在说什么。

我们的孩子在那里，家里所有其他人也都在那里。
e: Watch how people do things and listen to what other people say.

c: 它在刮风的时候一动也不动，你没有觉得奇怪吗？

e: Didn't you find it strange that it didn't move when the wind blew?

c: 那些是你的铅笔吗？是的，他们是我的。
那些铅笔是我的。
没有铅笔和纸？

Those pencils are mine.

c: 这个秋天你想去哪里呢？
朋友：中秋快乐！
你们是怎么过中秋节的？
e: Where do you want to go this fall?
Friends: Mid-Autumn happier!
How do you celebrate mid-autumn festival?

你觉得这件裙子怎么样啊？
这条裙子是多大号的？
e: Yesterday I saw a beautiful skirt in a shop.
How do you like this skirt?
What size is this skirt?

c: 然后我说再见。
然后你出现了。
先吃饭，然后去看电影。
e: Then I said goodbye.
Then you appeared.
First eat, then watch a movie.

c: 你的热情在哪里？
我的朋友对我热情友好。
他这个人热情好客。
e: What is your passion?
My friend is warm and friendly to me.
He is a good-natured and hospitable man.

c: 那么，你认为我是什么样的人呢？
但是，为什么汉人认为他们是汉人呢？
你认为你的工作怎么样？
e: Well, what the hell did you think I was?
But why did the Chinese think of themselves as Chinese?
How do you like your job?

c: 我是认真的。
他们是很认真的。
没错，我是认真的。
e: I am serious.
They were very serious.
Yes, I'm serious.

c: 我们很容易去喜欢那些好看的或在一起有趣的的人，我们不喜欢那些给我们带来不便或者让我们感觉不舒服的人。
我一直认为，对我来讲，最容易还的东西是钱，最难还的是人情。
我想我选那件工作，它看起来容易些。
e: We find it easy to love those who are good-looking or fun to have around, but we don't like people who inconvenience us or make us feel uncomfortable.
I have long believed that the most payable thing is money, while the most difficult thing to pay is favor received from others.
I thought I'd go for that job, it looks easy.

c: 如果天气好的话，你为什么不和我们一起去呢？
如果你和他们一起不见了的话，那我这个姐姐就白当了。
如果当年我没有休学，就不会去上那书法课，那么个人电脑就不会有现在我们看到的漂亮的字了。
e: If the weather is good, why don' t you come with us?
If you disappeared with them, I would be sorry that I was your sister.
If I had never dropped out, I would have never dropped in on this calligraphy class, and personal computers might not have the wonderful typography that they do.

c: 这是你的雨伞吗？
你的雨伞在哪儿？
这是会的雨伞？
e: Is this your umbrella?
Where is your umbrella?
Whose umbrella is this?

c: 这家饭店能上网吗？
然后，你就可以上网买东西了。
他一边上网，一边听音乐。
e: Does this hotel provide internet access?
After that, you can buy anything online.
He is web surfing, and also listening to music.

c: 我喜欢这个。他看上去生气的样子。
我很生气。
你为什么生气？
e: I like this one. He looks angry.
I am very angry.
Why are you upset?

c: 我想我听见了什么声音。
你听出来了吗？这是谁的声音？
让你的感情在你的声音中有所体现。
e: I think I hear something.
After listening, did you recognize [it]? Whose voice is this?
Let your feelings be reflected in your voice.

c: 这部电影使我想起了我的学校生活。
你使我想起我的后任女朋友。
她的病使她在医院里住了6个星期。
e: The film reminded me of my school life.
You remind me of my ex-girlfriend.
Her illness kept her in hospital for 6 weeks.

c: 这在中国和世界上都是少见的。
但世界杯不是今天开始的。
我们现在是在世界杯上，我有一次感觉到它了。
e: This is rare both in China and the world.
But the World Cup is not today.
Now we are at the World Cup, I am feeling it again.

c: 你看起来有点瘦。
这个不瘦的医生是什么价钱？
自上个月以来她瘦了好多。
e: You look alittle thin.
What price the not-skinny doctor?
She has thinned down a lot since last month.

c: 我女儿今天有点不舒服，所以她没去上学。
你怎么了？我不舒服。
他不太舒服，吃不下饭。
e: My daughter's a bit poorly today, so she didn't go to school.
What is wrong? I do not feel good.
He's not very well and doesn't feel like eating.

c: 正如我一定要穿我叔叔的衣服一样，我小妹一定要穿她姐姐的衣服。
你从他那里买下房子的那个人是我叔叔。
那些喜欢和他一起踢足球的小男孩都把他当作叔叔。
e: Just as I had to wear my uncle`s things, my little sister had to wear her big sister`s.
The man from whom you bought the house is my uncle.
He is uncle to all the little boys who like to play football with him.

c: 四下里一看，都是果树。
他在那棵树上，下不来了。
我是月琴学校的学生，这个学校很漂亮，有很多高楼，绿树，漂亮的花朵。我们也有很棒的老师，我喜欢在我的学校读书。
e: Looking around, one can see a vast stretch of fruit trees.
He is in that tree. He can't get down.
I am a student in Yueqing FLS. My school is very beautiful. there are many tall buildings, GREen tress, nice flowers in our school. We have wonderful teachers too. I like studying in my school.

c: 这个星期天你能帮我学习数学吗？
我在一所大学教数学。你是做什么的？
我喜欢学数学。
e: Can you help me with my math this sunday?
I teach mathematics at a college. What do you do?
I like studying maths.

c: 她正在刷外衣。
是时候用一些有意思的东西刷新我们的脑袋瓜子了。
你随时随地都可以做到。开车回家的路上，给孩子做午餐的时候，就寝前刷牙的时候，你都可以想象。
e: She was brushing at her coat.
It's time to refresh our brains with another list of fascinating factlets.
You can do this anytime, anywhere: On the drive home, as you're making the kids' lunches, when you brush your teeth before bed.

c: 我们都是出生在双数年份的同一个月的午夜前后（她是晚上十一点四十五分，我是在凌晨一点一十五分）；我们都学过竖笛。

e: If you want I'll invite my stepsister and her to have dinner with us.
Would you like to go to the cinema with us?
Would you like to have lunch on Saturday?

c: 这是越前的猫，有劳了，谢谢。
我以前每个星期都去，但现在很少去了，因为我发现越来越没意思了。
不过这些年来，他们已经在越变越好了。
e: This is Echizen's cat, there are workers, thank you.
B: I used to go to the English Corner every week, but now I seldom go because I find it more and more boring.
But over the years they have gotten better and better.

c: 太阳，星星和月亮都是天体。
太阳、月亮和星星都是天体。
你在那里看到的东西是月亮，之前的那个是太阳。
e: The sun, the stars and the moon are celestial bodies.
The sun, moon and stars are heavenly bodies.
What you see yonder is the moon, and the one before it was the sun.

c: 妻子在听到丈夫说“结束了”的时候或许不知所云，那么她就不仅听清他说了什么，还要听他说话的语气。
为什么是云？
明天的天气:上午晴，下午转多云。
e: A wife may not be sure that what her husband is saying means "the end." She should listen closely, not only to what he says, but also to how he says it.
Why the Cloud?
The weather for tomorrow: Clear in the morning, changing to light overcast in the afternoon.

c: 你看见站在那边的那个人了吗？
请让我在下一个站下车。
我的钱！站住！
e: Do you see the man standing there?
Drop me off at next stop.
My money! Stop!

c: 别着急，你得好好儿休息。
是我，爸，我告诉其他的小朋友不要着急。
店员：请您慢走，别着急。
e: Don't rush. You must have a good rest.
I told the other kids not to worry.
Shop assistant:Take it easy.

c: 我年老时谁来照顾我呢？
人们经常问我：你有六个孩子要照顾，怎么还能做那么多事？
然后我回家照顾狗，做一些家事，又要为第二天做准备了。
e: Who is to care for me when I'm old?
I often get asked how I can do so much while having six kids.
And then home to take care of the dogs take care of the family stuff again and get ready to start early the next day.

c: 照片站在你左边的那个男的是谁？
你为什么想要我的照片？
所以现在这间休息室里有我的照片了。
e: Who is the man on your left in photograph?
Why do you want my photos?
So I have my picture in the locker room.

c: 我让乔纳森去拿照相机来，给这些东西拍了照片。
萨姆买不起他极想要的那种照相机，因为那相机太贵了。
“他们担心照相机会摄取了他们的灵魂，他们害怕照相机就像以后害怕铁路和的汽车一样”，杨解释说。
e: I sent Jonathan to get my camera and we took this photograph.
Sam could not afford to buy the camera he longed for because it was too expensive.
"They were afraid that the machine would suck their soul, just like they were afraid of the railway and later, cars," Yang explained.

c: 我只在星期五做这样的工作。
这儿只有我们是外国人。
那只是他的妈妈。
e: I only do this on Fridays.
We are probably the only foreigners there.
That is his mother.

c: 我只在星期五做这样的工作。
这儿只有我们是外国人。
那只是他的妈妈。
e: I only do this on Fridays.
We are probably the only foreigners there.
That is his mother.

c: 最后他终于找到几本小说给了我。
在会议上，他们两人一唱一和，终于说服了上司。
2001年，我终于买了我人生中第一辆跑车。
e: At last he routed up some novels to give me.
At the meeting, the two persons "sang the same tune" and convinced the boss eventually.
In 2011, I finally bought my first sports car.

c: 现在有15分钟的中间休息。
或者它也可以作为你个人和工作时间表的中间人。
请把我的头路分在中间好吗？
e: There will now be a 15-minute interlude.
Or it can serve as the go-between for your personal and career schedules.
Would you part my hair in the middle, please?

c: 她怎么可能会看上这种人？
他看不起这种工作。
这种菜好吃不好做。
e: How could she be seeing someone like him?
He looks down upon this kind of work.
This dish is delicious but rather a trouble to prepare.

c: 重要的不是我说什么，而是我怎么说；重要的是在我做事和说话的时候，我看上去的样子。
不是“你的钱”，“你的学识”，而只是“你”-你的人-对我很重要。
他忙得没时间回我电话，而我们还有重要的公事要做呢。
e: It isn't what I say, but how I say it, and how I look when I do it and say it.
Not "your money" nor "your knowledge", but "you" - as a person - are important to me.
He' s too busy to return my calls, and we have some important business to finish.

c: A我们周末去明十三陵，你想和我们一起去吗？
那么，在这个节日的周末，我们要做些什么呢？
现在，他跟他爸爸常常在周末的时候在家里唱戏。
e: We are going to the Ming Tombs at the weekend. Would you like to go with us?
So what will we do on this holiday weekend?
Now he and his father often sing opera at home on weekends.

c: 我们的票卖完了，主要又是卖给年轻人的。
那老太太每天去买报纸，不多时便觉乐在其中，因为她主要是想和店主聊天。
你把次要问题看做主要问题了。
e: We're packed out and again chiefly to young people.
For the old lady buying the daily newspaper soon became an end in itself, since she really just wanted to chat with the shopkeeper.
You have taken a minor question for a major one.

c: 什么样的祝愿是那样的？
我祝愿你们在假期里都和我一样高兴。
什么样的道别是那样说的？什么样的祝愿是那样的？
e: What sort of wish is that?
I wish you all the same joy as me on your holiday.
What sort of farewell is that?! What sort of wish is that?

c: 然后在人行道上我注意到他在我后面。
说来有趣，我也看到了，而且我们的会员也告诉我们，他们同样注意到了。
儿子们和我注意看着。
e: Then I noticed he was on the sidewalk behind me.
Anecdotally I have seen this as well, and our members tell us they are seeing it too.
My sons and I watched.

c: 他有书在大多他的书橱和字典在其他二。
这个词从来没出现在过他的字典里。
我星期五把你的字典还给你。
e: He had books in most of his bookcases and dictionaries in the other two.
The word does not appear in its vocabulary.
I'll hand your dictionary back to you on Friday.

c: 他还说：“如果你只是想和你自己的女儿做爱，你就不会想要孩子。
他们可能再也不会试着自己做菜了。
谁不希望自己的孩子比别人更有出息？
e: He added: "If you only want your daughter for sex you don't want children.
They might not try cooking it again.
With each couple having only one child, who doesn't wish its child to do better than others?

c: 他总是在上课的时候睡觉。
下午，她总是会见她的朋友。
我们请她帮忙时，她总是那么不友好。
e: He always sleeps in the class.
In the afternoon, she always meets her friends.
She is always so disagreeable when we ask her to help.

c: 而在最近一天的一个中午，一些孩子说他们没有吃的。
你能告诉我怎样到最近的车站吗？
你能告诉我去火车站最近的路吗？
e: At noon, one recent day, several said that they had had nothing to eat.
Could you tell me the way to the nearest station?
Can you tell me the nearest way to the railway station?

c: 我们一起做作业。
她认为你的书面作业不太好。
你不做作业，也不练习，能学好汉语吗？
e: We do homework together.
She has a rather poor opinion of your written work.
You don't do [your] homework, don't practice, how can you [possibly] learn Chinese well?

c: 那么大师作用是什么呢？
他说那句话有什么作用？
他那样说是有他的作用的。
e: "What then is a Master for"?
What was his purpose in saying that?
He had an axe to grind when he said that.
